description:
You are a build-pipeline engineer who needs to investigate a failed nightly build.  
    Three raw build logs have already been copied to

        /home/user/build_logs/

    1. appserver_build.log  
    2. db_build.log  
    3. ui_build.log  

    Your goal is to create two artefacts inside

        /home/user/artifact_reports/

    (create the directory if it does not already exist):

    A. /home/user/artifact_reports/filtered_build_issues.log  
    B. /home/user/artifact_reports/issue_summary.json  

    ---------------  REQUIRED FILTERING RULES  ---------------  
    Scan every *.log file that is present in /home/user/build_logs and extract only the
    lines that match **ANY** of the following two REGEX tests.

      1. /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}\s+\[(ERROR|WARN)\]/  
         (lines that start with a timestamp followed by “[ERROR]” or “[WARN ]”).  
      2. /E\d{4}/  (anywhere in the line; denotes an error code such as “E5678”).  

    If *either* regex is satisfied the line is kept, otherwise it is ignored.

    ---------------  OUTPUT FILE #1  (filtered_build_issues.log)  ---------------  
    • Each kept line must be rewritten into the following single-line format

          <source_file>:<line_number>:<log_level>:<message>

        where  
          <source_file> = basename of the log file (e.g. “db_build.log”)  
          <line_number> = 1-based line index within that source file  
          <log_level>   = “ERROR” or “WARN”  
                         (lines that matched only because of “E\d{4}” are treated as ERROR)  
          <message>     = the *original* log line stripped of the leading timestamp and
                          leading severity tag (and any following whitespace).

        Example transformation  
            raw:  2023-07-19 14:20:58 [ERROR] Failed to copy artifact artifact-xyz.jar  
            out:  appserver_build.log:42:ERROR:Failed to copy artifact artifact-xyz.jar

    • Order matters!  After all conversions, sort the whole file first by
      <source_file> (alphabetically) and then by <line_number> (ascending).  
    • End the file with a single trailing newline (POSIX style).

    ---------------  OUTPUT FILE #2  (issue_summary.json)  ---------------  
    Generate a compact JSON document summarising how many WARN and ERROR lines were
    written to filtered_build_issues.log:

        {
          "<fileA>": { "ERROR": x, "WARN": y },
          "<fileB>": { "ERROR": x, "WARN": y },
          "<fileC>": { "ERROR": x, "WARN": y },
          "total":   { "ERROR": X, "WARN": Y }
        }

    • The keys for individual files must exactly match the basenames that appear in the
      build_logs directory.  
    • “total” is the cross-file sum of each level.  
    • Write the JSON completely minified (no extra spaces or line breaks except a final
      newline). The automated test will parse it with a JSON parser, so pay strict
      attention to the key names, capitalisation of “ERROR”/“WARN”, and integer values.

    ---------------  HINTS  ---------------  
    • You do not need elevated permissions; everything must be done as the current user.  
    • Feel free to use standard Unix utilities (grep, sed, awk, cut, sort, etc.) or any
      scripting language that is pre-installed in the container.  
    • Double-check that your regex handles the optional blank after “[WARN ]” and
      “[INFO ]”, and that lines matched only by the “E\d{4}” rule are categorised as
      ERROR.  
    • The task is considered successful only if both files exist, follow the exact
      formats described above, and the counts in issue_summary.json match the lines
      in filtered_build_issues.log.

    When finished, you can verify your own work by printing the two files to the
    terminal, but *do not* hard-code the expected numbers; derive them from the log
    content.
truth:
<!--  Existing files BEFORE the agent starts  -->
    <preexisting>
        <!-- Directory -->
        /home/user/build_logs/

        <!-- File: /home/user/build_logs/appserver_build.log -->
        2023-07-19 14:20:55 [INFO ] Starting build for appserver
        2023-07-19 14:20:56 [WARN ] Deprecated API usage detected
        2023-07-19 14:20:57 [INFO ] Compiling modules...
        2023-07-19 14:20:58 [ERROR] Failed to copy artifact artifact-xyz.jar
        2023-07-19 14:21:10 Build step completed
        2023-07-19 14:21:15 [INFO ] Running unit tests...
        2023-07-19 14:21:20 [ERROR] Test suite failed for module security
        2023-07-19 14:21:45  Tests run: 230, Failures: 3, Errors: 0, Skipped: 1
        2023-07-19 14:22:12 Build step failed with code E5678
        2023-07-19 14:22:20 [INFO ] Build finished with status FAILED

        <!-- File: /home/user/build_logs/db_build.log -->
        2023-07-19 14:00:01 [INFO ] Starting build for database layer
        2023-07-19 14:00:05 [WARN ] Outdated driver version detected
        2023-07-19 14:00:07 [INFO ] Executing migrations...
        2023-07-19 14:00:09 Script completed successfully
        2023-07-19 14:00:10 [ERROR] Migration 20230719_add_index.sql failed
        2023-07-19 14:00:11 Error code E3141 encountered during migration
        2023-07-19 14:00:15 [INFO ] Build finished with status FAILED

        <!-- File: /home/user/build_logs/ui_build.log -->
        2023-07-19 13:40:10 [INFO ] Starting build for UI
        2023-07-19 13:40:12 [INFO ] Installing dependencies...
        2023-07-19 13:40:18 [WARN ] Package "left-pad" is deprecated
        2023-07-19 13:40:28 [INFO ] Running lint...
        2023-07-19 13:40:30  Lint failed at component Navbar with E0987
        2023-07-19 13:40:33 [INFO ] Running unit tests...
        2023-07-19 13:40:45 [ERROR] 12 tests failed
        2023-07-19 13:40:55 [INFO ] Build finished with status FAILED
    </preexisting>

    <!--  Expected files AFTER the agent finishes  -->
    <expected>
        <!-- Directory must exist -->
        /home/user/artifact_reports/

        <!-- File: /home/user/artifact_reports/filtered_build_issues.log -->
        appserver_build.log:2:WARN:Deprecated API usage detected
        appserver_build.log:4:ERROR:Failed to copy artifact artifact-xyz.jar
        appserver_build.log:7:ERROR:Test suite failed for module security
        appserver_build.log:9:ERROR:Build step failed with code E5678
        db_build.log:2:WARN:Outdated driver version detected
        db_build.log:5:ERROR:Migration 20230719_add_index.sql failed
        db_build.log:6:ERROR:Error code E3141 encountered during migration
        ui_build.log:3:WARN:Package "left-pad" is deprecated
        ui_build.log:5:ERROR:Lint failed at component Navbar with E0987
        ui_build.log:7:ERROR:12 tests failed

        <!-- File: /home/user/artifact_reports/issue_summary.json -->
        {"appserver_build.log":{"ERROR":3,"WARN":1},"db_build.log":{"ERROR":2,"WARN":1},"ui_build.log":{"ERROR":2,"WARN":1},"total":{"ERROR":7,"WARN":3}}
    </expected>
